programme.title: Animal Show With Stinky And Jake
programme.desc: Stinky and Jake welcome a Turtle and a Wildebeest to the show.

programme.title: Animal Show With Stinky And Jake
programme.desc: Stinky and Jake welcome a shark and a sea lion to the show. These animals share a habitat: the deep blue sea!

programme.title: Counting With Paula
programme.sub-title: Prank You Very Much / Boys VS Girls
programme.desc: The children head to the Far East to join Pig & Panda's comedy talent show.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: The Camping Trip // Like Father Like Son
programme.desc: Rev can't wait to take Avery camping. But when he learns they're trying a new campsite for the first time ever, he is disappointed-what if the new campsite isn't as fun...or worse...boring?! It's up to Avery to get him excited for a new adventure! // Rev wants to be just like his dad, so he and Rumble attempt Ben and Duke's usual tasks. They're disappointed when they aren't strong enough to tackle the big jobs the way Ben would, but sometimes, a little Rev magic and Rumble power are even better!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Stuckey the garbage truck dreams of entering the Auto Show, so Rev and the gang clean him up for his big debut. But after saving his friends from danger, Stuckey winds up covered in mud all over again...just in time for his moment in the spotlight! // When Lori only receives two tickets to a movie premiere, her friends compete to see which one of them is her "best friend." But watching her friends compete only makes Lori feel terrible-she'd rather not go to the movie at all!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Fender Bend Friend Day // The Rev & Rumble Fan Club
programme.desc: Rev wants to surprise his friends with a movie celebrating their friendship, so he secretly gathers footage to show they're the best friends ever. When Avery realizes what he's up to, she adds her own clips to the movie - surprising Rev as well! // Owen hosts a virtual review of the gang's adventures with Rev and Rumble, plus all of their awesome gear! He walks his viewers through some of their most memorable moments, from mega stunts to monsters to rescue missions.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: The Gear Up Grand Prix // Chinese New Year
programme.desc: As the Gear Up Grand Prix begins, each of the friends runs into problems and must drop out of the race. Soon, slow and steady Lori is the only one left standing! Cheered on by her friends, can Lori and Tipper find the confidence to win? // When the gang puts on a Chinese New Year play, they cast Rumble as the monster. He's a natural! But in rehearsal Rumble begins to worry that he'll be too scary for the audience on opening night. Rumble will need his friends to help him find his roar!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: In Deep Doo-Doo // Rev's Tree Party
programme.desc: When Rev asks to help beautify the town, he insists there's no job too tough! That is...until he finds out he'll be hauling stinky manure. Rev tries to pawn the job off, until Avery tells him the best way to get it done is to just... "doo-doo" it! // When the gang organizes a birthday party for Rev, Avery insists they keep it secret. After hiding Rev's gifts in a tree, they realize the presents are stuck up there and will need to be retrieved-all before Rev figures out what's going on!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Rev and the gang are painting a mural for Four-Wheeled Friendship Day! But with Avery in charge, the friends start to lose confidence in their work. She may be a master when it comes to art, but Avery has a lot to learn about being project leader! // When the pals befriend a mouse in the barn, Rumble can't resist breaking the rules by bringing the little guy a snack. Before long there are mice everywhere! Rev and Rumble will need to shoo away their tiny guests, before Mom and Dad find them!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: When Rev finds out that Bo wants to be a Police Kid, he tells a white lie to make him one for a day! Officer Bo takes the new job too far, ticketing everyone-for everything. Rev will have to tell the truth to fix this mess and get his friend back! // At Camp Sleepaway, Bo is homesick. His friends try to lift his spirits, but after a stinky trip to the outhouse, he's had enough! That is...until a suggestion from Rev helps Bo to see the beauty all around. Maybe camp isn't so bad after all!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Rev hears a snowstorm is coming, he starts building the best winter track ever! One problem...Rev is sick. No matter what his friends say, they can't keep him away. Eventually he'll need to admit the best way for him to help is to go home and rest. // When Rev and Avery investigate veggie-rustling rabbits, they form a posse to run them out of town. The Cowboy Kids track down the thieving rabbits and discover they have babies! Now the posse will need to help the rabbits find a better way to feed.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Gear Up Garage Band // First Aid Fun
programme.desc: At band practice, Rumble struggles to control his nervous backfiring, even damaging the instruments by accident! Determined not to give up on the festival, the gang improvises and uses makeshift instruments. They even feature Rumble's nervous twitch! // When Rev and Owen begrudgingly agree to join Bo's First Aid Games, they do everything BUT take the lessons seriously. It isn't long before the boys find out that first aid isn't all fun and games, but it IS totally awesome!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Bo to the Rescue // Ice Cream Team
programme.desc: When Bo messes up on a few rescue missions, he decides to quit Bo's Rescue Hotline. Wanting to help their friend, the gang creates fake emergencies for Bo to solve. But as the friends find out, it takes more than trickery to build self-confidence! // As a heatwave hits Fender Bend, Rev and his friends look forward to Ice Cream Dream Day! But when the ice cream truck breaks down, it's up to the gang to find a way to deliver the tasty treats before they all melt.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Rev, Rumble and their friends help capture a group of wayward llamas, they each try and claim sole credit for the round up. Rev's parents listen patiently to the elaborate tales, each one starring a different hero, before ruling it a team effort! // When Avery creates a magnetic modification for Rumble, it seems to be the perfect solution. Now Rumble can help them tidy up the Gear Up Garage! But things get complicated when Rumble turns into a super-magnet, attracting all kinds of metal debris!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Fender Bend Friend Day // The Rev & Rumble Fan Club
programme.desc: Rev wants to surprise his friends with a movie celebrating their friendship, so he secretly gathers footage to show they're the best friends ever. When Avery realizes what he's up to, she adds her own clips to the movie - surprising Rev as well! // Owen hosts a virtual review of the gang's adventures with Rev and Rumble, plus all of their awesome gear! He walks his viewers through some of their most memorable moments, from mega stunts to monsters to rescue missions.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: After many years of working hard on Accelerator Acres, Tilly the tractor is ready to retire from ranch life. Rev wants to find her the perfect new job, but his ideas are too intense for old Tilly. He'll have to adjust to her slower pace first. // Rev and the gang compete for the title of Best Prankster-except Lori sits out, claiming pranks aren't her thing. After a full day of pranks and laughs, the kids gather for the big party that Lori planned for them...but all is not as it seems!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: The Wild Wheelin' Stunt Park // The Castle of Fender Bend
programme.desc: When damage from a storm threatens to cancel the Wild Wheelin' Stunt Park Skills Contest, Owen is disappointed he won't get to compete. Rev leads the kids in the Stunt Park clean-up, and soon discovers that this is really an opportunity in disguise! // Rev and the gang make their own castle and play as knights of old. But when their sticks and building supplies begin to disappear, Bo leads them into a medieval battle of wits with the culprit-a cranky beaver!

programme.title: Sing and Dance
programme.desc: Sing, dance & learn with fun songs about health, nature, and classic rhymes!

programme.title: Mya Go
programme.desc: Mya Go is a preschool animated show about a young girl whose enthusiasm infects everyone around her. Set in the bustling town of Everyday, Mya Go lives here with the Go family and lives nearby her closest friends.

programme.title: Kids Planet
programme.desc: Wow, I Never Knew That! is a whimsical, half-hour television series that is jam-packed.

programme.title: Hogie the Globehopper
programme.desc: Hogie the Globehopper is a fun tv show that will inspire a curiosity and fascination about the world and its people. Hogie and his friends Lorna, Bernie and Floaty travel the world, making lots of friends along the way.

programme.title: Back to Back
programme.desc: Embark on an electrifying journey as they boldly leap from one heart-pounding expedition to the next, fueled by their unbreakable bond and insatiable thirst for excitement. Get ready to be swept away in a whirlwind of adrenaline-pumping quests, where danger and discovery await them at every turn.

programme.title: Little Malabar
programme.desc: Little Malabar is very curious and very lucky. He gets to travel into the universe as if it were a big playground, and talk to planets and stars to understand where we come from and how our world took form.

programme.title: Play with Cocobi
programme.desc: Color play, dance, and more. Let's have fun with Cocobi!

programme.title: Ebb and Flo
programme.desc: The world of Ebb and Flo is seen through Ebb's eyes and Ebb reveals all the emotions grown-ups try to hide. Flo doesn't think of Ebb as a dog, and Ebb doesn't think of Flo as a small human, they just are the best of friends. Until Bird arrives to lovingly disrupt Ebb's world. Ebb and Flo's home is an old boat moored by the beach. Things Couldn't Be Better!

programme.title: Timmy Time
programme.desc: Being an ‘only lamb in the flock' Timmy has been used to getting his own way. Now for the first time Timmy is going to have to learn to get along with other little animals. Timmy is going to Nursery! Self-willed and naughty Timmy is going to have to learn how to share things with other youngsters and think about their feelings – not just his. Timmy is a gifted little footballer who needs to learn that it's not enough to kick the ball – you have to pass it too. Harriet Heron and Osbourne Owl, who run the Nursery are going to have their hands full, but Timmy gets it right in the end with a little help from his friends of the furry, feathery and spikey type.

programme.title: Berry and Dolly
programme.desc: Berry, the little snail boy and Dolly, the ladybird are best friends. Together they discover the world around them, while they make new friends with Balthazar the bee, Flutter the butterfly, Stanley the stag-beetle, Leapy the grasshopper, and many others.

programme.title: Doby & Disy: Exploring Journey
programme.desc: Adorable twin brother and sister, Doby & Disy, go on adventures in the magic forest together with their friends. They learn different colors, figures, songs and communication skills by solving various problems on the way.

programme.title: Stella And Sam
programme.desc: As they explore the world in all its seasons, Stella and Sam have wild adventures and comical mishaps. They make friends and discover many things - especially about themselves. If Sam is bold enough to rescue Fred from the sprinkler, then maybe he really can be brave enough to have a sleepover in the backyard tent. Every day is a new adventure, and Stella and Sam share the joy of discovering that they have what it takes to face the biggest adventure of all... growing up.

programme.title: Tommy the Little Dragon
programme.desc: Tommy is a soft toy who lives with an ordinary panda family. Panda parents have no idea about him, while their cubs cannot live a day without Tommy! With the help of his magic soap bubbles, Tommy teleports kids to wonderful universes full of adventures, to help them discover a vast and captivating world, fight their fears and inhibitions, and learn important family values.

programme.title: Back to Classics
programme.desc: This wonderful collection of classic rhymes has Miss Polly Had A Dolly, Baa Baa Black Sheep & more!

programme.title: Non Stop Hits
programme.desc: Get grooving with a medley of fun kids songs like Dinosaur Song, Fruits Song, and Colors Song

programme.title: The Adventures of Annie & Ben
programme.sub-title: The Adventures of Annie and Ben - Episode 7
programme.desc: Annie, Ben and Mango find themselves on Japan's Rabbit Island, where the king of bunnies challenges Ben to a race. We've all heard the story of the hare and the tortoise! Will Ben be the slow and steady one? Or will he snooze and lose?

programme.title: The Adventures of Annie & Ben
programme.sub-title: The Adventures of Annie & Ben - Episode 1
programme.desc: There's a Dragon's pearl hunt on Great Wall with Annie, Ben & Mango! Get ready for a fun adventure!

programme.title: Back to Classics
programme.desc: Here is a collection of back to back classic rhymes like Simple Simon,Twinkle Twinkle Little Star.

programme.title: Bedtime Lullabies
programme.desc: Let's Go To Sleep, Silent Night are bedtime lullabies guiding little ones to peaceful dream world.

programme.title: Bedtime Lullabies
programme.desc: From I hear thunder to Farmer in the Dell presenting lullabies that will help kids sleep well.

programme.title: Sweet Dreams
programme.desc: Sweet lullabies that gently ease children into a restful night's sleep.

programme.title: Soothing Melodies
programme.desc: Immerse in a world of Soothing Melodies like Finger Family, Little Boy Blue, and more

programme.title: Bedtime Lullabies
programme.desc: This episode offers calming lullabies like Twinkle Twinkle, Let's go to sleep, and many more!

programme.title: The Wiggles: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: Popular Australian kids' band The Wiggles are back for this series that features Wiggles classics and new material. Band members Anthony, Lachy, Simon and Emma -- the group's first female full-time member -- head out on a new adventure on the show "Ready, Steady, Wiggle!" mixes in clips of performances from the Wiggles' live tour in addition to songs performed on the series.

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes: Avengers Reassembled
programme.desc: The Avengers prepare for a party with a surprise guest when Ultron crashes the preparations by using mind control on Iron Man. While trying to rescue their leader, the rest of the team discovers that Baron Stucker, HYDRA, and Yellowjacket are in on Ultron's plans. While preparing for a party at Avengers' Tower, THE AVENGERS (IRON MAN, CAPTAIN AMERICA, BLACK WIDOW, HAWKEYE, THOR, HULK and VISION) notice Iron Man acting strangely. When Iron Man volunteers to go out and get more ice, they find it odd: when has Tony every volunteered to get anything? Suddenly, ULTRON appears on a screen: he's taken control of Iron Man! To make matters worse, Ultron takes over all the versions of Iron Man's armor and they fly off! The Avengers must now fight one of their own, and they're not sure what to do! Cap and Thor lead the charge, but can't fend off Iron Man and Ultron's Minions. Meanwhile, Black Widow, Hawkeye and Hulk track down a signal that seems to be controlling Iron Man from a castle in the “Little Sokovia” section of New York. There they fight HYDRA and BARON VON STRUCKER and learn that YELLOWJACKET is the “bug” that infected Iron Man's suit for Ultron. To help break Iron Man free from Ultron's control, the Avengers call in their own bug...ANT MAN! Finally, the Avengers confront Ultron and his Ultron Minions as they attack Avengers' Tower. Ultron's ultimate plan: use all the data/stuff they've stolen to free the newly rebuilt IRON LEGION, destroy the Avengers, and control the world. Tony dons the hastily repaired Hulk Buster Armor and it's on! It's a huge battle as the Avengers try to save their beloved HQ and defeat Ultron. Will they succeed? And, more importantly, can their party be saved after Ultron tries to take down their Tower?

programme.title: The Book Of Obsession
programme.desc: The Knights are tasked with protecting the King's valuable Ned Knights comic book during the Bookingheim Knight-a-Con. But with all the costumed kids there, will they recognize the real Jestro and Book of Monsters coming to get them? King Halbert instructs the Knights that they must take his valuable Ned Knights comic book to the “Knight-a-Kon” in Bookingham. It will be the first be first prize at the Knight-a-Kon. But the Book of Monsters wants the book, too. Having devoured Ned Knightly comic books in it's down time it has become fanatically obsessed with the storyline. General Magmar suggests they simply attack the place and take what they want, but Jestro tells them they can't: everyone will be in costume and they'll be thousands of comics there. This calls for a clever “infiltration” mission (which will also allow Jestro to see the Kon, which he's always wanted to do.) So Jestro goes into the Kon with the BOM and some monsters. And it's easy because everyone is in costume Jestro, the BOM and their monsters fit right in at the convention and Clay and crew have their work cut out for them trying to separate fiend from fan. Macy keeps going on-and-on about the story in the King's comic book as the Knights keep a watchful eye on it. Robin even shows up in the “Minitrex” – a small version of the Fortrex he built just for the Knight-a-Kon. He's convinced he can win the costume competition that is the big closing event for the Kon. At the end of the Kon there's a big awards ceremony for “Best Costume.” The prize: “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1.” The BOM must get it and scheme to get closer to it during the costume contest. He's just…about…to get the book when…the impatient Magmar attacks! Everyone thinks it's part of the big show! “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1” is tossed from person-to-person-to-person in the melee. The Knights must do something, but they're too far away from the Fortrex to download any NEXO-Power. Robin pulls up in his Minitrex they can use it to get NEXO-Power! Robin wins the best costume for his Minitrex and wins the Ned Knightly Comic which he then gives to Macy…she deserves to read it.

programme.title: Slugterra

programme.title: Slugterra

However, their plan goes awry when Underlord Holt arrives and commands the thieves to work together to bring him Pronto-dead or alive!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: When the Shane Gang travel to the Auroris Mine, they discover a legendary monster carved out of stone attacking the mines-the Pyritor. programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Determined to up his game against Stone Warriors, Kord visits a famous Eastern Technician for help creating a new blaster upgrade. Building the new upgrade is difficult...but working with the Technician is practically impossible!

programme.title: Slugterra

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.sub-title: The Return of the Eastern Champion

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Shane Gang take Tad under their wing, training him to blast like a pro with Eli's old blaster and teaching him to live by the slugslinger's code. Tad takes to it like a natural, and as Kord says, it looks like they have another "slugslinging savant from the Surface" on their hands. But their training will be put to the test when Tad accompanies them to a showdown with the Scrap Force...and the Shadow Clan!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Tad is still missing after the slug-out with the Shadow Clan, but the Gang have to set off without him when reports start coming in of slugs disappearing all across the 99 caverns. As they pursue the trail of missing slugs, the mystery grows darker when it leads them straight to Dr. Blakk's old stronghold!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Tad's hypnotic slug Pieper has gone megamorph, his gang of supporters all have Gattler blasters, and Tad's control over his army of ghouls is stronger than Dr. Blakk's ever was. The Shane Gang are under non-stop ghoul fire as they struggle to put a stop to Tad's plans and end the mass ghouling of slugs once and for all.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.sub-title: The World Beneath Our Feet Pt 2

But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie's play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: Xploration Awesome Planet
programme.desc: Philippe Cousteau Jr. is no stranger to exploration. The grandson of legendary underwater explorer Jacques Cousteau, Philippe hosts and serves as executive producer of this half-hour earth science series that examines the planet. He visits diamond and gold mines to see how gems and metals are formed, travels to active volcanoes to observe what happens inside the Earth's burning core, and checks out weather stations in mountainous areas to get an idea of how weather phenomena form in the atmosphere.

programme.title: Xploration Nature Knows Best
programme.desc: Marine biologist Danni Washington hosts this series that explains how nature has helped to inspire technology that people use on a daily basis. Some of the nature-inspired innovations include airplanes inspired by birds and helicopters that were influenced by dragonflies. The show also introduces viewers to people involved in creating innovations that are based on animals, including biologists who study the behavior of ants, architects designing "living buildings" and roboticists who are making their designs bigger and stronger based on animals.

programme.title: Xploration Outer Space
programme.desc: Americans have been fascinated by the cosmos for decades and rely on NASA to explore celestial bodies seen in the night sky to get a better idea of what is out there. In this series, former NASA employee Emily Calandrelli visits some of the agency's facilities, private companies and universities to speak with people knowledgeable about the topic to help "show off the coolest aspects of the space industry," to use her words. Technology, a potential manned mission to Mars and planetary tourism are some themes.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Mónica sugiere que Aurelio negocie su propia mercancía y la divida con los colombianos. Doña Alba se interpone cuando la idea separa a los hermanos Casillas.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Todos creen que Aurelio Casillas ha muerto en una sala de operaciones. Sin embargo, la muerte que tanto impactó al mundo del narco mexicano es, en realidad, una mentira de quien busca venganza.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Después de un tiroteo, Chacorta y sus hombres rescatan a doña Alba. El Chema se obsesiona con conocer la verdad sobre la muerte de Aurelio, y pide la lista de doctores que lo operaron.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Ludovico descubre que no tiene nada de dinero, el banco los va a embargar y Federica habla con ellos y les dice que Ludovico se murió para que cancelen su deuda, pero asistirán al velorio porque es una muerte muy sospechosa.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Ludovico no sabe qué regalarle a Federica para su aniversario, se emborracha con Flavio y van a tatuarse los nombres de sus esposas, pero los tatuadores se equivocan y ponen los nombres al revés.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Federica vende zapatos de piel por catálogo y Ludovico se pone muy celoso porque está ganando mucho dinero y decide competir con ella vendiendo ropa interior para mujer, pero es detenido por vender sin permiso.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Ludovico y Federica están aprendiendo a usar el chat para conocer gente usando nombres falsos. En el chat, sin darse cuenta. se encuentran entre ellos.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Federica y Ludovico creen que Ludoviquito tendrá su primera relación sexual. A lo que al final era el cumpleaños de la sobrina de don Camerino.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Ludoviquito accede a una apuesta con un compañero de la escuela para una carrera de perros el que pierda correrá en ropa interior con su familia.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.sub-title: El Extraño Mundo de los Comerciantes
programme.desc: Es el baile anual de los pequeños comerciantes, María va acompañada de Albertano. En la fiesta Rosa Aurora conoce al dueño de varias cremerías, él compra todos los boletos y la ganadora a reina es Rosa. Llega un amor de la presidenta del sindicato.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: Es la feria de San Juan y como cada año, Doña Lucha venderá huevos con confeti y harina pidiéndoles a sus hijos que le ayuden con esta tradición. Albertano y María entran a la casa de los sustos, Lucha al no ver a Albertano, lo busca desesperada.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: Don Carmelo quiere abrir una fonda en donde el platillo principal serían quelite, pero María no apaga la estufa y se queman, así que le piden ayuda a Doña Lucha para que cocine, al no tener muchos ingredientes, planea preparar sopa de lince.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: María le lleva un pastel a Doña Lucha por ser su santo, al chino al bajar unos platos encuentra la foto de su padre y le exige a Doña Lucha le confiese la verdad sobre él, ella le cuenta todo lo que vivió a lado de su padre y porque regresó a México.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: María cree que está embarazada y Albertano tiene problemas para aceptar que va a ser papá. El Macaco organiza una protesta en contra de la comercialización indebida del tamal.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: Detienen a Doña Lucha al creer que es la jefa de una banda de marchistas, para sacarla de la cárcel, sus hijos juntan sus ahorros con los que comprarían su regalo del 10 de mayo. En la cárcel los policías creen que ella mató a un delincuente.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: La llegada del bebé de Martina a la casa de los López se torna en una pesadilla cuando nadie puede dormir debido al llanto del pequeño. La Nena encuentra mensajes indiscretos en el celular de Aldolfo y cree que le es infiel.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: El hermano perdido y no reconocido de Plácido llega a casa de los López para quedarse. Plutarco olvida el cumpleaños de Gaby y tiene que buscar un buen regalo para compensar su error.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Enrique le hace saber a todo el colegio que la escuela opera bajo una logia y León sugiere clausurar el colegio. Carlo le propone una nueva oportunidad de trabajo en Estados Unidos a Alma. Juan discute con su papá por haberse unido a la logia.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Miguel ya no quiere trabajar para Franco, pero él le pide que vaya con Mia. Mia le pide a Alma que hable con su papá para que la deje cantar en el grupo. Alma le confiesa a Franco que sus hijos falsificaron sus firmas.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Ante el problema de la gaceta, Miguel defiende a Mia y dice que él es su novio. Roberta le dice a Luján que Teo se muere por ella, pero Luján no le cree. Gastón agradece a Miguel por haber dicho que él es el novio de Mia.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: El director del colegio le informa a Enrique que está despedido, pero él no quiere. Durante la cena, Mia pierde el control y al destapar la champaña, moja a todos. Luz intenta seducir a Miguel en el baño de hombres, pero Mia entra y le pega a Luz.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mía le reclama a Miguel que vaya a salir con Luz Viviana. Gastón se enfurece al descubrir a Miguel y Mía besándose. Todos los chicos se sorprenden al encontrarse en su viaje a Canadá. Franco se entera de que Carlos y Alma piensan vivir en Nueva York.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Franco se encuentra a Alma en un restaurante, pero se entera su novia y se molesta. Lupita le cuenta a Pilar que Tomás la besó. Mia le propone a Diego tener un romance en Canadá, al igual que Miguel a Roberta. Enrique tiene una discusión con Renata.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Vico, Celina y José pretenden juntar a Mia con Miguel y a Roberta con Diego. Teo insiste en que José sea su novia. Todos esquían en la nieve y se divierten. Alma está triste por Roberta. La mamá de Miguel busca a Franco.

programme.title: Pasión
programme.desc: Ricardo visita a John Foreman para pedirle que no revele su identidad. Don Ricardo y Mario registran la casa de don Alberto para buscar la carta.

programme.title: Pasión
programme.desc: Camila se altera cuando Ricardo quiere buscar la carta en la casa de Jorge. Jimena distrae a Jorge mientras Ricardo, Mario y Vasco buscan la carta en el palacio.

programme.title: Esmeralda
programme.desc: Esmeralda siente un fuerte dolor en el vientre y pide que llamen al doctor. Jessy coquetea con Adrián y él intenta evadirla. Fátima manda seguir a Adrián para averiguar donde vive.

programme.title: Esmeralda
programme.desc: José Armando recibe la noticia sobre el nacimiento del bebé de Esmeralda. Sebastián le cuenta a José Armando el interés que tiene Álvaro sobre Esmeralda. Fátima le reclama a Graciela por haberse encontrado con Adrián y la amenaza.

programme.title: Esmeralda
programme.desc: Fátima continúa su intriga para que Graciela se case con José Armando, y le asegura que Lucio reclamará la paternidad del niño. El orgullo de José Armando no le permite ver a Esmeralda con otro. Esmeralda recibe una llamada que la dejará helada.

programme.title: Esmeralda
programme.desc: José Armando le pide a Graciela que retomen su relación, pero ella le confiesa su amor por otro hombre. Álvaro le dice a Esmeralda que podrá operarla en un par de meses. La noticia de la boda toma por sorpresa a Esmeralda y a Adrián.

programme.title: Esmeralda
programme.desc: Adrián siente que el amor de Graciela se trata de una limosna y le pide dejarlo ya. Al llegar a su casa, sufre un ataque al discutir con Fátima y le confiesa su sentir a José Armando, además de aconsejarle que regrese con Esmeralda.

programme.title: Mañana es para siempre: Injusticias
programme.desc: Jairo le pide a Lucio que lo ayude a averiguar la verdadera identidad de Eduardo. Martina teme que Jairo intente matar a Silvestre. Bárbara lleva a cabo sus planes para que Damián termine su relación con Fernanda.

programme.title: Adán y Eva
programme.desc: Una singular narración de la historia de Adán y Eva durante su estadía en el Edén y su subsecuente expulsión.

programme.title: El Norteño Enamorado
programme.desc: Un hombre bueno de Texas es atacado junto con toda su familia por un malvado vecino, que quiere poseer sus tierras.

programme.title: El Águila Real
programme.desc: La mafia contrata a un hombre valiente, quién se enamora de la detective que lo persigue.

programme.title: ¿Con quién andan nuestras hijas?
programme.desc: Un grupo de jóvenes se ven involucradas en los problemas de una sociedad con valores en decadencia. A esto se añade el acoso de un seductor depravado, un fraude y líos con traficantes.

programme.title: La monja alférez
programme.desc: La historia de Catalina de Erauso, una mujer que llegó a ser alférez y al confesar su género se salvó de la ejecución.

programme.title: El intruso
programme.desc: Una pareja va a tener a su segundo hijo, cuando un amigo fallece ella se desmaya y el marido descubre su adulterio.

programme.title: El asesino enmascarado
programme.desc: Un jinete enmascarado que les roba a los ricos tiene aterrorizados a los habitantes de una región. El comisario manda a algunos hombres a investigar.

programme.title: El asesino invisible
programme.desc: Un genio inventa la forma de volver invisibles a los seres humanos, pero su creación es robada y utilizada para asaltar bancos.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Cuídate de la gente buena que la mala diosito te la señala
programme.desc: Una joven trabaja para ayudar a su madre que está enferma, un día es asaltada y pierde el dinero del alquiler, por lo que son sacadas de su casa. El destino une a la chica con un joven, quien resulta ser el hermano del ladrón que le robó el dinero.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Acuérdate, nuera, que también serás suegra
programme.desc: En un arranque de inseguridad y miedo, una joven le hace creer a su novio que su madre quiere separarlos. El joven tendrá que lidiar entre el amor de su madre y la obsesión de su novia.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Ana sufre maltrato físico por parte de su esposo. Entonces, decide mudarse con sus hijos a casa de sus suegros.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Jamás se encuentra un brillante en el aire
programme.desc: Una joven ambiciosa se enamora de un joven que se dedica al robo de autos de lujo y, a pesar de saber lo que hace, ella se queda con él para recibir la vida que se merece. La joven pagará las consecuencias de involucrarse con un delincuente.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: A borracho y mujeriego no le des a guardar dinero
programme.desc: Matías y Luis se encuentran una cartera con mucho dinero y deciden quedársela. Matías le pide a Luis que guarde su mitad del dinero.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Un joven y su madre quieren comprar un negocio de lavandería, pero les falta un poco de dinero para comprarla. Mal influenciado, el joven tomará dinero para involucrarse en un negocio de pirámide y así completar lo que les falta.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Humano es el errar y divino el perdonar
programme.desc: Durante una sesión fotográfica en la calle una chica sufre un accidente que la deja parapléjica. La madre de la joven culpa a su hijo por el accidente y está dispuesta a hacer lo que sea para que su hija vuelva a caminar.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Cada campana suena según el metal del que está hecha
programme.desc: Cuando Vanesa nace los médicos descubren que carece de útero y ovarios, pero tiene testículos ya en la adolescencia, Vanesa descubre de manera muy dolorosa que es una chica intersex.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Después de diez semanas donde los momentos de diversión, alegría y emoción se hicieron presentes, los pequeños viven el último programa de la competencia con un gran performance al lado de grandes artistas como Paulina Rubio.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Los jueces se dan a la tarea de seleccionar a los últimos participantes. Los aspirantes se enfrentan en una serie de duelos donde tendrán que demostrar sus cualidades de canto y baile.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Los pequeños tendrán que dar su mejor esfuerzo y demostrar su talento en el escenario, ya que cuatro cantantes, junto con cuatro bailarinas, serán eliminados en el primer duelo de la competencia.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: En sus vecindarios, los consideraban ciudadanos ejemplares, pero todo resultó ser una farsa y ahora todos dudan se la bondad que aparentaba una pareja muy peligrosa.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Monterrey es un lugar con muchas mujeres desaparecidas, jóvenes que salieron de sus casas y no volvieron. Ahora, sus padres están desconsolados y en busca de justicia.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: En una entrevista, el Papa Francisco da un regalo a los mexicanos con una charla amena donde fija la postura de la iglesia católica ante diferentes temas como la migración.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Desde una sobrecargo hasta una mariachi narran su experiencia en una vida donde no saben quiénes son. Personas transgénero que han nacido atrapados en un cuerpo que no es el suyo.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Madres que vieron a sus hijos triunfar en el mundo del espectáculo cuentan sus historias, el éxito en la niñez donde se vuelven estrellas es un mundo en el que las madres ven a sus hijos como sus pequeños.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Cordero y Venado se convirtieron en mejores amigos cuando iban a Estados Unidos como ilegales. Un coyote los vendió a una banda de traficantes de humanos y la familia de Venado pagó por su rescate.

programme.title: Hearts2Hearts 'FOCUS' Trailer
programme.desc: The album trailer captures the members' bold and free-spirited sides as they play around and dance together in a quiet space. Hearts2Hearts' first mini album FOCUS features a total of six tracks, including the title track “FOCUS,” the single “STYLE,” and the pre-release song “Pretty Please,” showcasing a diverse musical palette. In the latter part of the video, the title track “FOCUS” audio and part of the choreography are revealed, raising anticipation for the new release.

programme.title: Hearts2Hearts 'FOCUS' MV
programme.desc: Choreographed by Jo Na-In, the performance delivers a sleek and sophisticated atmosphere.Set against a school backdrop, the music video delicately captures the complex emotions between the members. Its lyrics sensually express the feeling of being completely focused on someone, offering a fresh glimpse into Hearts2Hearts' unique appeal. Hearts2Hearts' first mini album title track “FOCUS” is a house genre-based song that features a vintage piano riff and an addictive melody, showcasing the group's cool and chic vocal charm.

programme.title: NCT DREAM : They Were Here To Beat It Up Trailer
programme.desc: The trailer “They Were Here To Beat It Up” wittily portrays NCT DREAM breaking through their limits and opening a new chapter of their own stage with surreal visuals and storytelling, powerfully setting the tone for the beginning of the new album.NCT DREAM's 6th mini album “Beat It Up” consists of six tracks, including the title track of the same name, “Beat It Up.” Centering on the theme of “the speed of time,” the album delivers a bold message that the members — who have been running toward their dreams since childhood — continue to grow, while confidently moving forward at their own pace and in their own way.

programme.title: NCT DREAM 'Beat It Up' MV
programme.desc: The title track “Beat It Up” hits hard with bold kicks, heavy bass, and a vibe that's all about breaking limits with confidence. The music video amps it up even more with a boxer concept, powerful moves, snappy cuts, and punch-heavy choreography that fires off the song's energy.NCT DREAM's sixth mini album “Beat It Up” takes on the theme of 'the speed of time', sending a message that they're moving forward in their own pace and style.

programme.title: RIIZE 'Fame' Trailer
programme.desc: It expresses the members' moments of anxiety, emptiness, and the intense emotions that arise amid their struggles, Focusing on the unseen side of RIIZE's growth journey, the single features a total of three tracks, including the title track “Fame.” RIIZE's new single “Fame” is set to be released. all captured through RIIZE's unique genre of “emotional pop.”

programme.title: RIIZE 'Fame' MV
programme.desc: RIIZE's second single “Fame” is the group's first venture into a rage-style hip-hop track, expressing their artistic ideals as “emotional pop artists.” The lyrics reflect RIIZE's artistic vision, delivering the message that what they truly seek is not fame, but the sharing of emotions and love.The bold, forward-driving rhythmic structure combined with the raw texture of electric guitar creates a dynamic surge of energy.

programme.title: Melody Gardot, Charles Staab, Sam Minaie & Mitchell Long
programme.desc: In the 1960s, composer Michel Magne transformed the Château d'Hérouville, an 18th-century country house north of Paris and former home of lovers George Sand and Frédéric Chopin, into the first residential recording studio. In addition to its excellent facilities, the complex featured a swimming pool and a beautiful garden, allowing artists to stay for weeks or months at a time. From David Bowie and Iggy Pop to Pink Floyd and Chet Baker, countless stars recorded unforgettable music here until the studio closed in the 1980s. Three decades later, Château d'Hérouville has reopened its doors. This program follows American singer-songwriter Melody Gardot as she visits the legendary studio. After an accident in 2003 left her hypersensitive to light and sound, Gardot discovered the healing power of music. At Hérouville, she gives an interview and plays a breathtaking live set. Her performance opens with a beautiful version of ‘Baby I'm a Fool' and includes ‘If The Stars Were Mine' and ‘Les Étoiles,' before concluding with the Chet Baker hit ‘You Don't Know What Love Is.' Melody Gardot (piano, guitar, vocals) is accompanied by Charles Staab (drums), Sam Minaie (double bass), Mitchell Long (guitar), Sylvain Gontard (trumpet), Ludovic Beier (accordion), Artyom Manoukyan (cello), and Guillaume Latour, Alexandra Kondo, and Benjamin Ducasse (violin).

programme.title: Omer Avital
programme.sub-title: Omer Avital Qantar - Jazz in Duketown
programme.desc: Jazz in Duketown is the largest free outdoor jazz festival in the Netherlands. It's a real gathering for jazz addicts, inviting internationally renowned artists. Israeli-American double bassist Omer Avital plays radiantly energetic, resounding jazz with oriental influences. At Jazz in Duketown 2019, Avital forms a quintet with saxophonists Asaf Yuria and Alexander Levin, drummer Ofri Nehemya, and pianist Eden Ladin. They present singular repertoire from Avital's album 'Qantar'.

programme.title: Al Jarreau, Tom Canning, Peter Robinson & Ralph Humphrey
programme.sub-title: Al Jarreau - The North Sea Jazz
programme.desc: The North Sea Jazz Festival is the largest indoor music festival in the world, known globally as the event where the past, present and future of jazz are featured within three days. Next to a firm base of jazz as the festival's staple music genre, many others, such as blues, soul, funk, or hip hop, pass by. In 1981, American singer and Grammy Award winner Al Jarreau gave an unforgettable performance for the audience of the North Sea Jazz Festival in The Hague, the Netherlands.

programme.title: Jimmy Smith
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Chet Baker
programme.desc: This selection of unforgettable performances by some of the most iconic and influential male jazz and pop vocalists in history showcases these legends' unique essence. Delight in the expressive beauty and emotional depth of Chet Baker's rendition of “Time After Time” and “You Don't Know What Love Is", recorded live in Brussels, Belgium in 1964 and in Rome, Italy in 1956 respectively. Revel in Frank Sinatra's iconic version of “I've Got You Under My Skin". Immerse yourself in Dizzy Gillespie's dynamic performance of “Let Me Outta Here”, recorded live in Denmark in 1970. Enjoy Tony Bennett's unforgettable performance of “It Don't Mean A Thing (If It Ain't Got That Swing)” at London's majestic Royal Albert Hall in 1974. Let the haunting beauty of Nat King Cole's 1957 performance of “Autumn Leaves” and Louis Armstrong's performance of “Basin Street Blues” from 1959 delight you. Dean Martin's smooth vocal stylings will enthrall you as he performs the jazz standard “Wrap Your Troubles In Dreams". Witness the electrifying energy of Sammy Davis Jr.'s performance of “Too Close For Comfort”. Join us for this unforgettable musical experience that you'll surely cherish!

programme.title: Charlie Haden
programme.sub-title: Charlie Haden & Orchestra - North Sea Jazz
programme.desc: The North Sea Jazz Festival is the largest indoor music festival in the world, known globally as the event where the past, present and future of jazz are featured within three days. Next to a firm base of jazz as the festival's staple music genre, many others, such as blues, soul, funk, or hip hop, pass by. In 1985, American jazz bassist and composer Charlie Haden performed a mesmerizing concert at the North Sea Jazz Festival in The Hague. Known for his collaborations with free-jazz pioneer Ornette Coleman, Haden brought his own New Liberation Orchestra to the festival.

programme.title: Jaco Pastorius
programme.desc: The audience at the Montreal Jazz Festival in Canada was in for a treat on July 3, 1982, as a true musical innovator hit the stage: Jaco Pastorius, who transformed the electric bass into a formidable solo instrument. Combining intricate harmonics, fluid melodies, and unparalleled technical skill, Pastorius left a lasting impact on the music world. In this concert, he is accompanied by Peter Erskine (drums), Don Alias (percussion), Othello Molineaux (steel drums), Bob Mintzer (tenor sax and bass clarinet), and Randy Brecker (trumpet and electronics). They perform “Chicken”, “Donna Lee”, “Mr. Phone Bone”, and “Fannie Mae”. Don't miss this extraordinary opportunity to experience Jaco Pastorius's electrifying performance at the Montreal Jazz Festival 1982!

programme.title: Art Farmer
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Ron Carter
programme.desc: Ron Carter, Bobby Hutcherson and Joe Chambers are legends of Blue Note Records. They have established themselves as forward-thinking and inventive band leaders, composers and studio musicians, astonishing audiences around the world with their creativity and technical versatility.

programme.title: Sir Simon Rattle & London Symphony Orchestra
programme.sub-title: The LSO performs Dvořák and Tchaikovsky
programme.desc: Sir Simon Rattle conducts the London Symphony Orchestra (LSO) in a concert program consisting of Antonín Dvořák's Scherzo Capriccioso in D-flat major, Op. 66, and selections from Act II of Pyotr Ilyich Tchaikovsky's famous ballet The Nutcracker (1892). Dvořák's Scherzo Capriccioso (1883) reflects a period of personal crisis for the composer. The work betrays ever-changing moods and a constant sense of inner restlessness. In the music of The Nutcracker, Tchaikovsky combined memorable melodies with colorful orchestration, which has enchanted listeners for decades. This performance was recorded at LSO St Luke's in London, UK, on March 18, 2021.

programme.title: Philippe Jordan & Orchestre de l'Opéra national de Paris
programme.sub-title: Beethoven - Symphony No. 3 in E-flat major, Op. 55
programme.desc: Swiss conductor Philippe Jordan and the Orchestre de l'Opéra national de Paris recorded all of Ludwig van Beethoven's symphonies in 2014-2015. In this program, Jordan conducts Beethoven's Symphony No. 3 in E-flat major, Op. 55, ‘Eroica'. Composed in 1803 and 1804, this symphony is regarded as a major turning point in Beethoven's oeuvre as well as Western music history. Symphony No. 3 is longer in duration than any previous symphony. The customary long introduction is replaced by two powerful chords, followed by the introduction of the main theme by the lower strings. The slow second movement is a Funeral March, followed by a quick Scherzo. The fourth and final movement is dominated by a theme from Beethoven's ballet music for ‘The Creatures of Prometheus'. This performance was recorded at Opéra Bastille in Paris, France, in 2014.

programme.title: Sir Simon Rattle & London Symphony Orchestra
programme.sub-title: The LSO performs Dvořák and Tchaikovsky
programme.desc: Sir Simon Rattle conducts the London Symphony Orchestra (LSO) in a concert program consisting of Antonín Dvořák's Scherzo Capriccioso in D-flat major, Op. 66, and selections from Act II of Pyotr Ilyich Tchaikovsky's famous ballet The Nutcracker (1892). Dvořák's Scherzo Capriccioso (1883) reflects a period of personal crisis for the composer. The work betrays ever-changing moods and a constant sense of inner restlessness. In the music of The Nutcracker, Tchaikovsky combined memorable melodies with colorful orchestration, which has enchanted listeners for decades. This performance was recorded at LSO St Luke's in London, UK, on March 18, 2021.

programme.title: Ludwig Wicki, Danish National Symphony Orchestra, DR Junior Choir & Andrea Lykke Oehlenschlæger
programme.desc: Swiss conductor Ludwig Wicki leads the Danish National Symphony Orchestra and the DR Junior Choir in a sparkling concert program of film music. The program features a selection of music from great and Oscar-winning Hollywood films, including Titanic, The Bodyguard, Pirates of the Caribbean, Braveheart, and Moulin Rouge, written by major composers such as John Williams, Hans Zimmer, James Horner, and Klaus Badelt. Highlights include ‘He's a pirate/Davy Jones' from Pirates of the Caribbean: Dead Man's Chest ‘Now We Are Free' from Gladiator ‘My Heart Will Go On' from Titanic and ‘Shallow' from A Star Is Born. Featured soloists in this concert are the young talented singers Andrea Lykke Oehlenschlæger and Diluckshan Jeyaratnam. This performance was recorded at the DR Koncerthuset in Copenhagen, Denmark, in May 2022.

programme.title: Les Dissonances & David Grimal
programme.sub-title: Tchaikovsky - Symphony No. 4 in F minor, Op. 36
programme.desc: Les Dissonances is a collective of artists founded by violinist David Grimal in 2004. The conductorless ensemble consists of musicians from the most prestigious European orchestras, international soloists, and young talents. In this performance, Les Dissonances perform Pyotr Ilyich Tchaikovsky's Symphony No. 4 in F minor, Op. 36. The composer wrote the symphony between 1877 and 1878, and dedicated it to Nadezhda von Meck – an exceptionally wealthy widow and great admirer of Tchaikovsky's music, whom the composer described as ‘my best friend'. Tchaikovsky explained in his letters that the symphony is characterization of the nature of fate. The work opens with a powerful motif in the horns and bassoons representing fate. The second movement expresses melancholy, whereas the third presents ‘fleeting images that pass through the imagination when one has begun to drink a little wine'. Although the ‘fate' motif reappears toward the end of the final movement, the movement has a festive character. This performance was recorded at La Cité de la musique in Paris in 2016.

programme.title: Mariss Jansons, Berliner Philharmoniker & Emmanuel Pahud
programme.desc: Joseph Haydn (1732-1809): Symphony No. 94 in G major "Surprise" - Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart (1756-1791): Flute Concerto in D major, K. 314 - Hector Berlioz (1803-1869): Symphonie fantastique Op. 14. Emmanuel Pahud (flute), Berliner Philharmoniker conductor: Mariss Jansons. The European Concert has been a tradition of the Berliner Philharmoniker since 1991. The musicians commemorate the anniversary of the orchestra's founding on May 1st, 1882, playing in different European cities. This concert was recorded in the church "Hagia Eirene" in Istanbul, Turkey.

programme.title: Ocean Vibes

programme.title: Flying Over Oahu
programme.desc: "Flying Over Oahu" offers a 97-minute aerial journey over Oahu's iconic coastlines with nature sounds and music by Alex Smith (The Cynic Project). From Waikiki Beach to Turtle Bay, enjoy breathtaking 4K landscapes, ending with a stunning Waikiki sunset.

programme.title: Flying Over Spanish Islands
programme.desc: In their first collaboration, cinematographer Stefan Zimmerman and Nature Relaxation™ producer David Huting present "Above the Spanish Islands." This 50-minute 4K aerial film captures Mallorca and the Canary Islands, set to ambient music by Diamans, Electus, and Michael St. Laurent.

programme.title: Flying Over Iceland
programme.desc: "Flying Over Iceland: Part I" provides a soothing aerial journey through eastern Iceland's fjords and valleys, starting at sunrise in Brei_dalsvik. Enjoy views of mists, a waterfall, and the Brei_dals' river, set to nature sounds and music by The Cynic Project, showcasing East Iceland's beauty.

programme.title: Flying Over Iceland 2
programme.desc: "Flying Over Iceland II: Summer in the Golden Circle" presents a serene aerial view of Iceland's south coast, starting at Skogafoss and moving to Vik, with black sand beaches, cliffs, and Vatnajökull glacier. Filmed in 2020, this 1-hour film features local wildlife and immersive music.

programme.title: Flying Over Kauai
programme.desc: "Flying Over Kauai" provides a soothing aerial journey over Hawaii's Garden Island, featuring the lush NaPali Coast, waterfalls, canyons, and beaches. Paired with new music by The Cynic Project and nature sounds, this 4K film offers a visually and sonically immersive experience.

programme.title: Flying Over Oahu

programme.title: Hawaii Beaches: Oahu 2
programme.desc: Escape to the sandy solitudes of Hawaii's tropical beaches for 2 hours in 4K UHD with this ambient nature film featuring just the stereo nature sounds.

programme.title: Four Seasons: New Zealand
programme.desc: See New Zealand from four different angles: summer, fall, winter, and spring.

programme.title: Journey Around the World
programme.desc: There is no better way to relax and unwind than traveling to the world's most breathtaking and remote locations.

programme.title: Kahakuloa Bay: Hawaii
programme.desc: From high up on a lush and isolated cliff, plunge into the waters of Kahakuloa Bay on West Maui's rugged North Shore.

programme.title: Bryce Canyon Relaxation
programme.desc: Replace your worries with the wonders of one of the world's most breathtaking natural destinations: Bryce Canyon, in Utah. Filmed in 4K UHD, this 1-hour ambient cinematic experience immerses viewers in over 20 different real-time scenes from a perfect summer day and gentle clouds passing.

programme.title: Hidden Tropical Paradise 2
programme.desc: Have you ever wanted to just escape from it all? Now you can turn any screen into a window to a hidden garden island, located in the the remote north-eastern islands of Fiji. Begin your journey as the sun pierces through trees as vibrant blue waves break on a white sandy beach progress up the island to a lush lookout, and enjoy distant wave breaks, trees and birds, and passing clouds. Finally transport yourself back to the beach as the day continues and end it with a beautiful sunset scene as it falls over a distant mountain. It's 120 minutes of pure nature bliss!

programme.title: Four Seasons Around the World
programme.desc: A kaleidoscopic journey through a shimmering summer, a cozy fall, a breathtaking winter, and a glowing spring.

programme.title: Eyes on the East—Part 1
programme.desc: Experience the vivid mosaic of Asian American and Pacific Islander heritage, where each artwork tells a story of the community's diversity and resilience. The collection is visual celebration capturing the essence of a vibrant cultural tapestry.

programme.title: Latin Lens—Part 2
programme.desc: From bold murals to evocative photographs, this collection illuminates the rich heritage and unique perspectives of Latin American artists. The melodies are bright, and the instruments feature guitars, keys, horns, synths, bongos, and shakers.

programme.title: Shades of Brown
programme.desc: Celebrate the rich and earthy palette of brown. From warm sepia tones to deep siennas, the artwork evoke a sense of grounded elegance and rustic charm, exploring the diverse emotions and textures of this versatile color.

programme.title: Autumn Hues—Fall Harvest
programme.desc: Explore the rich, warm palette of the season. This art collection showcases the stunning beauty of fall foliage alongside the earth's abundance. It's a perfect blend of vibrant landscapes and heartfelt scenes of seasonal bounty, capturing autumn's splendor.

programme.title: Man Cave—Part 1
programme.desc: Electrifying art redefines the modern man's sanctuary. Bold and inspiring pieces radiate strength, courage, and vitality, transforming the space with elements of jazz, funk, and alternative hip-hop.

programme.title: Tranquil Impressions—Part 1
programme.desc: Discover a serene and evocative collection that offers a peaceful escape from the hustle and bustle of everyday life. Each piece inspires a sense of calm, wonder, and awe, inviting you to immerse yourself in tranquility and find solace in its beauty.

programme.title: Hypnotic Visuals—Joe Winograd
programme.desc: An evolving collection of motion artwork by Joe Winograd, exploring the surreal atmosphere of the ‘late night' state of mind. Winograd's captivating visuals transport viewers into a dreamlike realm where time feels fluid, blending imagination with the quiet mystery of the night.
